nasb.text: Then Laban and Bethuel replied, “The matter comes from the Lord; so we cannot speak to you bad or good.

esv.text: Then Laban and Bethuel answered and said, “The thing has come from the Lord; we cannot speak to you bad or good.

cnv.text: 拉班和彼土利回答，說：“這事既然出於耶和華，我們就不能對你說好說歹。

ccb.text: 拉班和彼土利回答说：“既然是耶和华的安排，我们不能再多说什么。

csbs.text: 拉班和彼土利回应说：“这事出于耶和华，我们不能向你说好说歹。
